name: chat-sample
description: Sample chat extension that generates automated tests using Playwright and TypeScript.

chatParticipants.name: cat
chatParticipants.description: Meow! What can I teach you?

commands.name: randomTeach
commands.description: Pick at random a computer science concept then explain it in purfect way of a cat

commands.name: play
commands.description: Do whatever you want, you are a cat after all

disambiguation.description: The user just wants to relax and see the cat play.
examples: Enough learning, let the cat play with a ball of yarn
Can you show me a cat playing with a laser pointer?

disambiguation.description: The user wants to learn a specific computer science topic in an informal way.
examples: Teach me C++ pointers using metaphors
Explain to me what is a linked list in a simple way
Can you explain to me what is a function in programming?

chatParticipants.name: atrtestgenerator
chatParticipants.description: I can generate API and Web UI tests using Playwright and TypeScript

commands.name: api
commands.description: Generate API tests with Playwright and TypeScript based on your requirements

commands.name: web
commands.description: Generate Web UI tests with Playwright and TypeScript based on your requirements

commands.name: play
commands.description: Generate a sample test to demonstrate Playwright capabilities

disambiguation.description: The user wants to see a sample test to learn about Playwright testing.
examples: Show me a basic test example
Can you give me a sample of a Playwright test?

disambiguation.description: The user wants to generate automated tests using Playwright for their application.
examples: Create tests for my login API
Write a test for user registration form
Can you help me test my checkout process?

commands.name: all
commands.description: Use all registered tools. By default, only this extension's tools are used.

chatParticipants.name: catTools
chatParticipants.description: I use tools, implemented using @vscode/chat-extension-utils, and am also a cat

commands.name: all
commands.description: Use all registered tools. By default, only this extension's tools are used.

languageModelTools.name: chat-tools-sample_tabCount
languageModelTools.modelDescription: The number of active tabs in a tab group

tabGroup.description: The index of the tab group to check. This is optional- if not specified, the active tab group will be checked.

languageModelTools.name: chat-tools-sample_findFiles
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search for files in the current workspace

pattern.description: Search for files that match this glob pattern

languageModelTools.name: chat-tools-sample_runInTerminal
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Run a command in a terminal and return the output
